priority_basis: M-001 is the only canonical continuity-owned item. Its prior handoff required contradiction-safe history, and the latest continuity evidence identified repository-wide ID allocation as the next unresolved integrity control.

completed.action: Added a fail-closed repository-wide continuity ID allocator and deterministic adversarial test specification.

claim_states.observed: The continuity namespace spans continuity-index.json, operations/continuity/records, and operations/continuity/memory; a previous duplicate required migration from CM-0010 to CM-0013.
claim_states.inferred: A pre-write allocation guard lowers the probability of semantic-key collisions and destructive repair pressure.
claim_states.proposed: Wire the allocator into every continuity record writer and add an atomic reservation mechanism for concurrent runs.
claim_states.superseded: Single-directory visual inspection is not an adequate allocation method.
claim_states.unresolved: Runtime tests and concurrency safety remain unverified in this connector-only run.

next_action: Execute the allocator tests and full continuity validator in a checkout, then replace advisory allocation with an atomic reservation or single-writer protocol before concurrent automation creates new continuity records.
